## Diagram PR Summary

Describe what this diagram change explains and why it is needed.

## Intent Block
- goal:
- scope:
- audience: devs | managers | mixed
- important nodes/steps:
- known errors/branches:

## Agent Evidence (Required)
- intent-curator verdict:
- diagram-generator output attached: yes | no
- rule-lint verdict: PASS | FAIL
- visual-qa verdict: PASS | FAIL
- merge-gate verdict: READY FOR PR | BLOCKED

## Compliance Checklist
- [ ] Uses allowed declaration (flowchart LR or sequenceDiagram)
- [ ] Includes title, legend, scope boundary, and main flow
- [ ] Uses approved symbols/edges only
- [ ] Node IDs are kebab-case
- [ ] Edge labels use explicit verb phrases
- [ ] Error flow is included when applicable
- [ ] No disallowed styling or interactivity
- [ ] Diagram complexity is within limit (<= 15 nodes)

## Output Artifacts
- Diagram file(s):
- Preview screenshot(s) (optional):
